LanguageData.FB_BilePodlingSpawnDesc: Grow one bileburst podling near this gland. Requires full hemogel network supply.
LanguageData.FB_BilePodlingSpawnFailed: The bile mortar gland cannot grow a bileburst podling right now.
LanguageData.FB_BilePodlingNoSpawnCell: There is no clear cell nearby for a bileburst podling.
LanguageData.FB_BileMortarFireDesc: Select a map cell within {1} cells to bombard. The gland will call the most charged reachable bileburst podling with at least {0}% volatile bile, load it, and launch it as a living shell. Impacts can scatter by about {2} cells.
LanguageData.FB_BileMortarNoLoadedPodling: No reachable bileburst podling has at least {0}% volatile bile.
LanguageData.FB_BileMortarCannotFire: The bile mortar gland cannot fire right now.
LanguageData.FB_BileMortarCannotReach: The selected bileburst podling cannot reach the mortar.
LanguageData.FB_BileMortarOutOfRange: Target is outside bile mortar range ({0} cells).
LanguageData.FB_BileMortarAlreadyLoading: A bileburst podling is already loading into this gland.
LanguageData.FB_BileMortarAutoManualDisabled: Auto-fire is enabled. Right-click the command to disable it before choosing a manual shot.
LanguageData.FB_BileMortarAutoHint: Left-click for a manual shot when auto-fire is off. Right-click to toggle auto-fire.
LanguageData.FB_BileburstChargePausedNoSupply: Charge growth paused: the linked mortar lacks full hemogel supply.
LanguageData.FB_VolatileBileBarTooltip: This podling's explosive bile charge. At 25% or higher it can be loaded into a bile mortar gland.
LanguageData.FB_DevBileburstDetonateDesc: Order this bileburst podling to crawl to a selected target or cell and rupture its stored volatile bile. Dev-only.
LanguageData.FB_BileburstChargeTooLow: Volatile bile must reach at least {0}% before detonation.
LanguageData.FB_BileburstCannotDetonate: This bileburst podling cannot detonate there.
LanguageData.FB_BileburstCannotReach: The bileburst podling cannot reach the detonation target.
